events.description: Agencies submit five-year capital improvement plans
Agency strategic plans and budget requests are submitted to the Division of the Budget
Division of the Budget provides its budget recommendations to agencies
The Consensus Revenue Estimating Group meets to estimate State General Fund revenues
Governor presents recommendations regarding agency budgets to the Legislature
Example of Service Delivery System and Outcomes
Lapse of unencumbered balances in special revenue funds
Agencies should budget estimated debt service payments for FY 2025 and explain that these amounts are estimated.
State Finance Council was created to act on budget matters that arise when the Legislature is not in session
Rates may differ depending upon the contractor involved.

evidence.quote: The budget cycle can be divided into four categories: executive preparation, legislative consideration, execution, and audit/evaluation.
One of the biggest environmental factors for state agencies is the state’s fiscal status.

No discussion of an organization’s operating environment would be complete without an understanding of the revenue and expenditure estimates of the state as a whole, as well as of individual agencies.
Another type of output indicator measures efficiency.
evidence.note: An efficiency measure is generally stated as a ratio of output to input or as an average.

evidence.quote: As required by KSA 75-3717, the narrative description for each new or expanded program must include an estimate of anticipated expenditures that would be required to support the new or expanded program for the budget year and three ensuing fiscal years (see Enhancement Packages below).
The approved budget may include any combination of the following, depending on the agency’s funding structure:

Savings.  (a)  Any unencumbered balance as of June 30, 2024, in any special revenue fund, or account thereof, of any state agency named in this act which is not otherwise specifically appropriated or limited by this or other appropriation act of the 2025 regular session of the legislature, is hereby appropriated for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, for the same use and purpose as the same was heretofore appropriated.
evidence.note: Savings clause for limited special revenue funds

evidence.quote: Agencies should use the following expenditure account codes for debt service payments on capital projects (1) to enter their debt service estimates into the budget system and (2) for coding vouchers that make debt service payments from the State General Fund or any special revenue fund.
evidence.note: The principal portion of the debt service payment is a capital expenditure, because only that portion constitutes a capital asset when the debt is retired.
